data.author: Aditi Bharade
data.title: Labubu's wide, toothy grin is coming to the silver screen
data.description: Fans can look forward to a "live‑action and CGI hybrid" Labubu movie, produced by big-name Hollywood talent.
data.content:
Labubu will be making its way to Hollywood.Pop Mart
  • Pop Mart and Sony Pictures are bringing Labubu to the big screens.
